title: Verify phone number - Positive flow
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Offers screen. | User's phone number is not verified.
test_steps: Open the app. | Navigate to the Offers screen. | Click on the 'Verify' button. | Enter the user's phone number. | Submit the phone number for verification.
expected_result: User is redirected to a verification page. | User receives a verification code. | User can view current offers after verification.

title: Verify phone number - Negative flow
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Offers screen. | User's phone number is not verified.
test_steps: Open the app. | Navigate to the Offers screen. | Click on the 'Verify' button. | Enter an invalid phone number. | Submit the invalid phone number.
expected_result: User is not redirected to a verification page. | User receives an error message. | User cannot view current offers.

title: Verify phone number - Boundary validation
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Offers screen. | User's phone number is not verified.
test_steps: Open the app. | Navigate to the Offers screen. | Click on the 'Verify' button. | Enter a valid phone number with 10 digits. | Submit the phone number.
expected_result: User is redirected to a verification page. | User receives a verification code. | User can view current offers after verification.

title: Verify phone number - Toggles state
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Offers screen. | User's phone number is not verified.
test_steps: Open the app. | Navigate to the Offers screen. | Click on the 'Verify' button. | Enter a valid phone number with 10 digits. | Submit the phone number. | Check if the 'Verify' button changes to 'Resend Code'.
expected_result: User is redirected to a verification page. | User receives a verification code. | User can view current offers after verification.

title: Verify phone number - Clickable buttons
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Offers screen. | User's phone number is not verified.
test_steps: Open the app. | Navigate to the Offers screen. | Click on the 'Verify' button. | Enter a valid phone number with 10 digits. | Submit the phone number. | Click on the 'Resend Code' button.
expected_result: User is redirected to a verification page. | User receives a new verification code. | User can view current offers after verification.
